rootCauseSummary: -march lacks zba_zbb extensions. SHA-256 Sigma/Maj rotations suboptimal (3-instr vs 1-instr roriw).
patchSummary: 候选补丁应通过聚焦修改 Configurations/10-main.conf 来解决 blueprint diag-20260611-153337。

problem.summary: SHA-256 sha256_block_data_order_riscv64 on SG2044 runs scalar (IPC=2.047, L1 miss=0.074%). Sigma/Maj rotations use sllw+srlw+or (3 instr) instead of single roriw (zbb). Already has v extension but missing zba_zbb bit-manipulation.
evidence: perf annotate: Sigma/Maj use sllw/srlw/or triplets, no roriw
zbb roriw would reduce rotation from 3 to 1 instruction

rootCause.summary: -march lacks zba_zbb extensions. SHA-256 Sigma/Maj rotations suboptimal (3-instr vs 1-instr roriw).
performanceFactors: zbb universally available on C920v2 (RVA22 mandatory)

patchPlan.objective: -march lacks zba_zbb extensions. SHA-256 Sigma/Maj rotations suboptimal (3-instr vs 1-instr roriw).

changes.rationale: -march lacks zba_zbb extensions. SHA-256 Sigma/Maj rotations suboptimal (3-instr vs 1-instr roriw).
instructions: 做出最小的、保持行为不变的性能修复，以解决 RootCauseBlueprint 指出的根因。
避免无关重构和格式噪音。

patchPlan.expectedDiffSummary: 候选补丁应通过聚焦修改 Configurations/10-main.conf 来解决 blueprint diag-20260611-153337。

patchCandidate.gitDiff:
diff --git a/Configurations/10-main.conf b/Configurations/10-main.conf
index 1b765a0..9a56106 100644
--- a/Configurations/10-main.conf
+++ b/Configurations/10-main.conf
@@ -818,8 +818,8 @@ my %targets = (
     # specifications,
     "linux64-riscv64" => {
         inherit_from     => [ "linux-generic64"],
-        cflags           => add("-march=rv64gcv_zvkned"),
-        cxxflags         => add("-march=rv64gcv_zvkned"),
+        cflags           => add("-march=rv64gcv_zba_zbb_zvkned"),
+        cxxflags         => add("-march=rv64gcv_zba_zbb_zvkned"),
         perlasm_scheme   => "linux64",
         asm_arch         => 'riscv64',
     },

regressionResult.command: agent1 patch_regression --case test_slh_dsa --case test_evp --case openssl_speed_sha256 --case perf_annotate_sha256_riscv64

tests.name: openssl_speed_sha256
tests.output: Deferred to SG2044 — expected IPC improvement from roriw

tests.name: perf_annotate_sha256_riscv64
tests.output: Deferred to SG2044 — expected roriw replacing sllw+srlw+or

regressionResult.summary: Add zba_zbb bit-manipulation extensions to linux64-riscv64 target. 2-line config change. zbb provides single-instruction roriw for SHA-256 rotations. Deferred to SG2044 for runtime verification.

commands: agent1 patch_regression --case test_slh_dsa --case test_evp --case openssl_speed_sha256 --case perf_annotate_sha256_riscv64

instructions: 以 Git 差异和回归证据作为事实来源。
在不改变已验证补丁内容的前提下准备拉取请求和提交材料。
在提交说明中保留 RootCauseBlueprint 和回归证据。
